title: Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor
text:
Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor

May 28, 2026

# Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖

We've upgraded every Teamtailor career site to work seamlessly with AI agents like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Comet, so candidates can find your jobs wherever they search.

Suzan Dil

More and more candidates are letting AI agents do the searching for them. They ask "find me a marketing job in London" and want their agent to come back with real opportunities. To show up in those answers, your career site needs to speak the agents' language. We've got you covered 🚀

Every Teamtailor career site now supports the latest open standards for the agentic web, including llms.txt, AI-friendly robots.txt rules, sitemaps, link headers, markdown content negotiation, and content signals. You don't need to do anything to enable this.

This means AI agents can discover your open roles, read your content and guide candidates straight to your application form, with no extra setup from you. It's live on all career sites today.

We hope you and your future candidates will like this.

❤️ / The Product Team

Check out some more articles that may be of interest!

### Build custom Analytics reports using AI ✨

### Teamtailor Co-pilot can now edit text your way ✨

### Latest integrations: Powering up your recruitment workflow (Dec 2025 – Mar 2026)

- May 25, 2026Just describe the chart you want, and Co-pilot generates it for you.
- Apr 14, 2026Teamtailor's Co-pilot helps you refine text directly in the Job Editor. Apply quick editing actions, or use custom prompts to tailor your job ads.
- Apr 9, 2026We are thrilled to announce new and powerful integrations that have gone live from December to March!

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

title: Crafting Compelling AI Job Posts: Techniques for Effective Talent Attraction
text:
How To Craft Compelling Job Posts With AI
# Crafting Compelling AI Job Posts: Techniques for Effective Talent Attraction
Most job postings are awful. They are made up by managers copying and pasting content they like, only to leave candidates feeling confused by this jumble of skills and requirements that don’t make sense. AI has only accelerated this problem by helping teams generate this generic content faster.
This mistake costs companies time and money every day jobs sit open without applicants, the wrong people apply, or worse: the wrong candidates get hired. Where do you start? In this session with job post expert Kat Kibben, you'll get a master class how-to that will help you use AI to write a job post that generates the results you want.
What’s In It For You:
Use AI to optimize job titles for SEO,
The 3 questions that improve the quality of hiring manager intake meetings,
Prompts for revising mandatory requirements and removing buzzwords,
What everyone in HR and recruiting needs to know about the importance of job posts in an AI world and more!
**Outline**

title: An ATS with AI to Power Your Recruiting | Ashby
text:
An ATS with AI to Power Your Recruiting | Ashby

- ATS
- Sourcing & CRM
- Scheduling
- Analytics
- Responsible AI

### AI at Ashby

# Get better results in less time with AI in Ashby.

Power your recruiting process from sourcing to debriefs with thoughtfully developed AI features across Ashby's All-in-One recruiting platform.

## How we think about AI

## What makes AI in Ashby different?

Ashby’s all-in-one data spans the entire candidate journey, unlocking AI workflows that are not possible in fragmented tech stacks. As we continue expanding our AI capabilities, here are some of our guiding principles.

##### Powered by your all-in-one data

Ashby All-in-One houses all your recruiting data, enabling AI and automation workflows across multiple features.

##### AI that's assistive in nature

AI in Ashby is built to assist you in making better decisions, faster. Not to replace your team's decision-making.

##### Dedicated engineering resources

We ship features quickly, and have a team of dedicated engineers working on unlocking new AI use cases.

##### No gimmicky features

We’re focused on shipping AI-powered tools that solve our customers' top problems.

##### Technology you can rely on

We’re building AI on the most reliable LLMs, with data and security protocols you can trust.

##### Full control over your process

Our AI features always allow you to review, tweak, toggle on/off, and control your process.

##### Optimize your hiring processes

AI-powered features help keep your data clean for better reporting and hiring outcomes.

##### Adopt AI features on day one

We ship out-of-the-box, adoption-ready AI features you can trust to be ready for use across your team.

##### See better results

Ashby customers see a 46% lift in reply rate from AI-powered outreach campaigns.

## ATS

## Reduce the time burden of application review and act on top talent faster

Efficiently review inbound applications, ensure consistency in evaluations across your team, and deliver

title: Reach your goals faster with Teamtailor's Co-pilot ✨
text:
Reach your goals faster with Teamtailor's Co-pilot ✨

Jun 26, 2025

# Reach your goals faster with Teamtailor's Co-pilot ✨

Elevate your hiring effortlessly with AI tools. Meet Co-pilot in Teamtailor—your recruitment ally powered by OpenAI.

Suzan Dil

Co-pilot is the groundbreaking AI assistant that helps you improve your recruitment process and reach your goals faster. You're still the captain, but now you have a co-pilot helping you make better decisions.

Activate Co-pilot in Add-on features. Once Co-pilot is activated in your account, you can select which features you think should be enabled in Settings → Recruitment → Co-pilot. It's powered by OpenAI's GPT AI models.

Want to see Co-pilot in action? Check out this 5 minute video showing some of the features.

These are the features that the Teamtailor Co-pilot can assist with:

#### Job creation

Draft a job description in an instant

Suggest job application questions

Suggest interview kit questions

Translate questions with a click

Suggest skills and traits

Answer interview kit questions

#### Recruitment & candidate experience

Find matching candidates from your pool

Generate resume summary

Get a full overview with Meeting insights

Smart screening of candidates

Draft reject email

Help writing blog posts

---

## Draft a job description in an instant

Get help from Co-pilot to write a job description. Simply enter a job title and Co-pilot will create a draft for you. It will use the same style as your previous job description, and it will mention any skills and traits selected in the Evaluation step.

## Suggest job application questions

Based on the job ad Co-pilot can help you suggest questions to use in the application form. Start by opening the editing mode for the job in question and here the Application step. Scroll down and click Suggest questions under the Questions section. 5 new questions will be added each time the button is clicked, and from these, you can choose which ones you wish to us

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

Please note: This website includes an accessibility system. Press Control-F11 to adjust the website to people with visual disabilities who are using a screen reader; Press Control-F10 to open an accessibility menu.

Accessibility

- Press enter for Accessibility for blind people who use screen readers
- Press enter for Keyboard Navigation
- Press enter for Accessibility menu

# Michał Nowak

## Senior VP, Technik

Michał leitet die technische Abteilung von SmartRecruiters und ist verantwortlich für Softwareentwicklung, Infrastruktur und Sicherheit.

Michał hat die letzten 15 Jahre damit verbracht, verteilte Systeme aufzubauen und Ingenieurteams in verschiedenen Branchen zu leiten. Er kam 2012 als einer der ersten Mitarbeiter zu SmartRecruiter und half bei der Skalierung der Plattform, um die Anforderungen einiger der größten Unternehmen der Welt zu erfüllen.

Seine Leidenschaft ist es, technische Organisationen zu schaffen, in denen Teams befähigt werden, Geschäftsergebnisse zu erzielen.

Michal hat einen Master-Abschluss in Informatik von der Jagiellonen-Universität.

##### Rebecca Carr

##### Thomas DiDesidero

##### Robert Symons

VP, Partnerships und Development

##### Steve Hardy

##### Alison Bosch

##### Michał Nowak

##### Shiran Yaroslavsky

##### Lehua Stonebraker

## Dive deeper with valuable insights

# Michał Nowak

## Senior VP, Technik

Michał leitet die technische Abteilung von SmartRecruiters und ist verantwortlich für Softwareentwicklung, Infrastruktur und Sicherheit.

Michał hat die letzten 15 Jahre damit verbracht, verteilte Systeme aufzubauen und Ingenieurteams in verschiedenen Branchen zu leiten. Er kam 2012 als einer der ersten Mitarbeiter zu SmartRecruiter und half bei der Skalierung der Plattform, um die Anforderungen einiger der größten Unternehmen der Welt zu erfüllen.

Seine Leidenschaft ist es, technische Organisationen zu schaffen, in denen Teams befähigt werden, Geschäftsergebnisse zu erzielen.

Michal hat einen Master-Abschluss in Informatik von der Jagiellonen-Universität.

title: Naukri India | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
Naukri India | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## Naukri India

Naukri’s integration with TeamTailor simplifies the process of posting open requisitions to seamlessly flow from the external ATS system into Naukri.

Naukri.com is India's No. 1 job posting website and to post jobs & hire candidates across Industries, locations & experience levels Our intelligent sourcing API harnesses the power of AI and machine learning to enhance candidate discovery. By tapping into vast, diverse talent pools and leveraging sophisticated algorithms, it identifies and recommends top-tier candidates who align perfectly with your specific job requirements. This proactive approach ensures that your talent acquisition efforts are both comprehensive and efficient.

title: Jonathan Milne — Author at Lever | Lever
text:
Jonathan Milne — Author at Lever | Lever

JM

# Jonathan Milne

Jonathan Milne is the VP of AI Services at Demand Spring, where he helps B2B marketing teams put smart strategies and automation tools into action—from Marketo to HubSpot to Salesforce. With 20+ years in tech, Jon got his start in HR software at emPerform, giving him a unique perspective on the intersection of marketing, AI, and talent technology. As recognized thought leader, Jon has spoken at top industry events like TiECon Canada, Accelerate OTT, MarketingProfs B2B Forum, and B2B Marketing Exchange. He’s also been named a Top 40 Under 40 honoree by the Ottawa Business Journal and is the founder of the AI for Good Forum, a community initiative helping professionals use AI to grow their careers and make a positive impact.

## Articles by Jonathan

No articles published yet.

title: SmartRecruiters Unveils AI-Powered Platform to End ATS Era

SmartRecruiters Unveils AI-Powered Platform to End ATS Era

# SmartRecruiters Unveils AI-Powered Platform That Ends the ATS Era

## Welcome to the Next Generation of Hiring Technology

San Francisco, CA – June 10, 2025 — SmartRecruiters, The Recruiting AI Company, today announced the launch of its next-generation AI-powered hiring platform, redefining how enterprises attract, engage, and hire talent. This launch marks the end of the traditional Applicant Tracking System and the beginning of an intelligent, embedded, and orchestrated approach to hiring.

At the heart of this new platform is Winston, an agentic AI companion that eliminates administrative complexity, accelerates decision-making, and empowers every stakeholder in the hiring process. Winston supports recruiters, candidates, and hiring managers alike through real-time assistance, automation, and guidance.

This is not another feature release or surface-level enhancement. This is a foundational shift in how hiring gets done.

### Hiring Has Been Broken for Too Long

Despite years of digital investment, most hiring teams still face the same core problems. Recruiters are buried in repetitive tasks. Hiring managers are disengaged or overloaded. Candidates face slow, impersonal experiences. Most systems digitized legacy processes but failed to modernize them.

SmartRecruiters has reimagined the system from the ground up. Intelligence is no longer an overlay. It is the operating logic.

### Introducing Winston

Winston is a real-time AI recruiting companion built on advanced Large Language Models (LLM). It adapts to the user, learns from t
